summary: Implemented REST credential endpoints with file upload handling, live API validation, and cross-provider dependency checking. Added hasCredential/findCredentialMetadata methods to CredentialService. Created credentialRouter.ts with: fileUploadHandler middleware (10KB limit, multipart/form-data parsing, temp-dir cleanup), live validators for GitHub PAT (scope check), Cloudflare token, and Expo token via outbound HTTPS calls, file validators for Apple .p8 (PEM format + SHA-256 duplicate detection) and Google Play key (JSON field validation), checkDependencies enforcing cloudflare_token→domain_name and apple_team_id→apple_p8 prerequisites, and POST /projects/:projectId/credentials/:credentialType endpoint returning {credentialId, type, validatedAt} without exposing plaintext. Registered the router in api.ts. Added 35 tests covering unit validators, mock live API calls, multipart uploads, dependency enforcement, and HTTP response shape.
